declarations.description: Iranian national code input web component built on jb-input. It accepts Persian and English digits, truncates to 10 digits, normalizes value to English digits, and adds Iranian national-code checksum validation.
declarations.name: JBNationalInputWebComponent

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial or reflected national code value inherited from jb-input. Prefer the value property for controlled updates.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label text and accessible aria label inherited from jb-input.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name inherited from jb-input.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Enables required validation. A string value is used as the required validation message.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: External validation error message inherited from jb-input.

attributes.name: disable-auto-validation
attributes.description: Stops automatic validation inherited from jb-input.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size variant inherited from jb-input.

members.name: value
members.description: Canonical normalized national code value in English digits, up to 10 digits.

members.name: displayValue
members.description: Value rendered in the input after digit filtering. Persian digits may remain in displayValue.

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper inherited from jb-input with an added Iranian national-code checksum validation.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Inherited from jb-input. Runs validation without showing the error message.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Inherited from jb-input. Runs validation and shows the first error message.

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Inherited from jb-input. Focuses the inner native input.

events.name: input
events.description: Inherited from jb-input. Dispatched on each user input after value standardization.

events.name: change
events.description: Inherited from jb-input. Dispatched when the value is committed.

events.name: beforeinput
events.description: Inherited from jb-input. Cancelable event dispatched before the native input changes.

events.name: enter
events.description: Inherited from jb-input. Dispatched when Enter is pressed.

events.name: invalid
events.description: Inherited from jb-input. Dispatched when validation finds an invalid value.

slots.name: start-section
slots.description: Inherited jb-input slot rendered before the native input.

slots.name: end-section
slots.description: Inherited jb-input slot rendered after the native input.

cssProperties.name: --jb-national-input-input-direction
cssProperties.description: Direction of the inner input text. Default is ltr.
